productDisplayName: Jockey MC Men Olive Y Front Briefs 8003
description: Style Note Revel in the comfort of soft fabric with this brief from jockey. The superior fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered fly construction offers maximum support. Product Details Olive green hip brief, has a Y Front fly opening, low rise waistline, higher contoured leg opening for freedom of movement, unique double layered fly construction for optimum comfort and support, new high-tech cushioned waistband for smooth and comfortable grip with branding Material and Care 100% combed cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Tumble dry low
